title: Convert integration tests to TAP format

log.context: Convert integration tests to TAP format

Done. Here's a summary of what changed:

**File:** `/mnt/data/bigclungus-meta/tests/integration_test.py`

**What changed (output format only, zero test logic altered):**

- `run_test()` now emits `ok N - <name>` on pass, or `not ok N - <name>` followed by a YAML diagnostic block (`---` / `message:` / `...`) on failure. A module-level `_test_counter` tracks the test number.
- `__main__` block now opens with `TAP version 14` and the plan line `1..7`, iterates a `TESTS` list instead of calling `run...(truncated)
